text:
VANTIX BIOSCIENCES

Investigator Payment Schedule — Protocol ASCEND (VTX-330-201)

Site ARP-12 - Pl Elena Park - Effective 2025-11-01

Schedule A — Per-Visit Payments

 

Visit Payment (USD)
Screening $685.40
Vi $418.75
V2 $842.60
V3 $523.10
v4 $471.50

Schedule B — Site Fees
Fee

Site Initiation / Start-up

IRB / Regulatory Submission

Payment Terms

Amount Cadence
$8,000.00 one-time
$3,500.00 one-time

Per-visit payments are auto-paid through eClinicalGPS at the contracted visit amount; no site invoice is

raised for scheduled visits.

Unscheduled procedures (e.g. repeat labs) are billed per procedure performed and are NOT auto-paid

— they must be invoiced separately.

Site fees (start-up, IRB) are invoiced directly. Net 45.

No holdback, no overhead.

Unscheduled procedures are billed per procedure performed — e.g. Repeat Hematology (Blood Draw, Central

Lab) at $112.40.
